news.headline: US weekly jobless claims drop as third-quarter GDP increases.

Global AI in Energy Market to reach $58.66 billion by 2030, with CAGR of 36.9%. Top players include Schneider Electric, GE Vernova, ABB Ltd. Opportunities lie in renewable energy integration and carbon emission reduction.
news.summary: The global AI in Energy Market is expected to grow from $8.91 billion in 2024 to $58.66 billion by 2030, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 36.9%. The market report by MarketsandMarkets™ contains 394 tables, 62 figures, and is spread across 319 pages. Drivers for this growth include energy market volatility, consumer demand for smart energy solutions, while the industry faces restraints like data privacy concerns and high implementation costs. Key players in the market include Schneider Electric SE, GE Vernova, ABB Ltd, and others. The application of AI and Machine Learning in energy can lead to reduced labor hours and operational costs by moving towards predictive maintenance strategies. Solutions segment is predicted to have the largest market size in the forecast period. Shifts toward carbon emission reduction and renewable energy integration provide opportunities for growth in the field.

news.headline: BAM Management wins Indiana Management Company of the Year award for 2024 by IAA for exemplary performance.
news.summary: In Indianapolis on December 19, 2024, BAM Management was honored as the 2024 Management Company of the Year by the Indiana Apartment Association (IAA). This prestigious award highlighted BAM Management's outstanding portfolio, employee initiatives, workplace environment, community contributions, and industry participation.

news.headline: Renew-V vaginal moisturizer created by 2 sisters: Dr. Darlene Gaynor, a urologic surgeon, and Beth Geduld, CEO.
news.summary: In Aventura, Florida, on December 19, 2024, a groundbreaking vaginal moisturizer known as Renew-V™ was introduced to the public. This innovative product was developed by two sisters: Dr. Darlene Gaynor, a seasoned Board-Certified Urologic Surgeon renowned as the "Big Sister" in the partnership, possessing more than 25 years of experience specializing in women's health, and her sibling, Beth Geduld, referred to as the "Younger Sister"...

news.headline: Unibet sponsors 2025 IIHF Ice Hockey World Championship in Sweden and Denmark, strengthening its presence.
news.summary: In Sliema, Malta, on December 19, 2024, Kindred Group plc revealed that its primary brand, Unibet, has been named an Official Sponsor for the 2025 IIHF Ice Hockey World Championship. The championship will be held across various countries including Sweden and Denmark. This partnership marks a significant step for Unibet in expanding its reach and presence in the sporting world.

news.headline: Record number of travelers expected for holiday season 2024. Squaremouth.com analyzes data from thousands of travelers.
news.summary: St. Petersburg, Florida, December 19, 2024 - This upcoming holiday season is projected to see a remarkable surge in the number of travelers traversing both roads and skies. Surprisingly, the destinations these travelers are flocking to may not be what you'd expect. Squaremouth.com, a prominent travel insurance marketplace in the country, reviewed data from numerous sources and highlighted a significant increase in...

news.headline: Arizona's Hard Money Lenders offers competitive rates and fast funding for bridge loans, led by Michael Iuculano.
news.summary: In Phoenix on December 19, 2024, Hard Money Lenders Arizona revealed their new competitive rates and efficient funding process for bridge loans. The company, under the guidance of Michael Iuculano, a prominent alternative lending specialist in Arizona, is offering attractive loan options for borrowers in need of fast funding solutions.

news.headline: Sunny's new report discusses America's loneliness epidemic based on U.S. Census data, offers solutions.
news.summary: A recent report by Sunny, a nonprofit organization focused on promoting meaningful social connections, has unveiled insightful findings from the U.S. Census Household Pulse Survey. This report, titled "Social Connection in the Modern World," offers groundbreaking insights into the state of social connections in today's society. Released on December 19, 2024, in Dallas, the report sheds light on key statistics and trends concerning social interactions. Through analysis of data from the survey, Sunny aims to highlight the importance of fostering genuine social connections in the modern age. This report serves as a valuable resource for understanding and improving social connections, with implications for individuals, communities, and society as a whole.

news.headline: Ygrene Energy Fund makes Inc.'s 2024 Best in Business list for Financial Services, recognizing top companies.
news.summary: Ygrene Energy Fund has proudly secured a spot on Inc.'s prestigious 2024 Best in Business list, which acknowledges industry leaders excelling in their respective fields. This recognition specifically places Ygrene Energy Fund in the Financial Services category. The annual list highlights top-performing companies and showcases their dedication to excellence.

news.headline: Study by Sungkyunkwan University in Seoul uncovers genomic evolution of brown algae crucial for coastal habitats.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on December 19, 2024, it was reported that the Earth's oceans, which cover more than 70% of the planet's surface, are essential for maintaining ecological balance and supporting human health. Brown algae, known as Phaeophyceae, are highlighted for their crucial role in sustaining coastal habitats.

news.headline: Banzai acquires OpenReel, aims for $10 million+ revenue in 2024.
news.summary: Seattle-based company Banzai International, Inc. (NASDAQ: BNZI) revealed on December 19, 2024, that it completed the acquisition of OpenReel, a top digital video creation platform. Banzai specializes in marketing technology services and offers vital marketing and sales solutions. This strategic acquisition marks a significant milestone for Banzai as it expands its capabilities in the digital video sector.

news.headline: Pfizer stock is in question after company rose on 2025 guidance, uncertain if it's a buy or sell. PFE stock status unclear.
news.summary: Should investors consider buying or selling Pfizer stock following a significant jump due to its mixed projections for 2025? Is it advisable to buy or sell PFE stock at this moment?

news.headline: NaaS Technology (Nasdaq: NAAS) partners with TCC to enhance charging interconnectivity in China.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NAAS) revealed a significant development as the first U.S.-listed electric vehicle (EV) charging service firm in China. The company established a strategic memorandum of understanding with TCC Energy Storage Technology (Hangzhou) Co., LTD. This move signifies a pivotal step in the collaboration between the two entities.

news.headline: VSee Health signs teleradiology contract with top care hospital system, set to begin in Q1 2025, covering three locations.
news.summary: A prominent telehealth solutions provider, VSee Health, Inc. (Nasdaq: VSEE), based in San Jose, California, revealed the acquisition of a notable teleradiology contract with a leading post-acute care hospital system in the United States. Expected to commence in the first quarter of 2025, this collaboration signifies a significant enhancement to VSee's expanding portfolio of teleradiology clients, showcasing its standing as a reliable source for cutting-edge imaging services. The preliminary phase of implementation will cover services at three hospital sites.

news.headline: Hyperlink InfoSystem named official Salesforce Consulting Partner, emphasizing importance of CRM for organizations.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, in both New York and Los Angeles, it was announced that Customer Relationship Management (CRM) has transitioned from being a passing trend or optional marketing strategy to a crucial tool for businesses in all sectors. This tool has become vital for organizations to effectively engage with their customers and drive success. By enhancing customer interactions, improving sales processes, and increasing customer satisfaction, CRM has become a cornerstone for businesses looking to thrive in today's competitive market.

news.headline: BGM Group and Jointown collaboration for pharmaceutical development; Chairman Xin Zhanchang leads sales team to visit partner in China.
news.summary: In Chengdu, China on December 19, 2024, BGM Group Ltd. (NASDAQ: BGM) announced that Mr. Xin Zhanchang, Chairman of the Board of Directors of BGM Group and Chairman of Gansu Qilianshan Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., headed the sales team for a visit to their established strategic partner.

news.headline: Paychex Inc. reported Q2 results for November 30, 2024, comparing to previous year: Total Revenue (in millions) for the period.
news.summary: In the second quarter of fiscal year 2024, Paychex, Inc. announced its financial results for the period ending on November 30. A comparison with the same period in the previous year showed the following changes: Total revenue for the three months ended November 30, 2024, was reported in millions. For the same period in 2023, there was a percentage change in total revenue. Similarly, for the six months ended November 30, 2024, the total revenue was disclosed in millions, with a comparative change from the prior year. Please note that all amounts are in millions, unless specified otherwise.

news.headline: GreenPower to deliver 11 BEAST electric school buses to Western U.S. markets. Company specializes in zero-emission vehicles.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, in Los Angeles, GreenPower Motor Company Inc. (NASDAQ: GP) (TSXV: GPV) announced its prominent position as a top manufacturer and supplier of specialized all-electric, emission-free medium and heavy-duty vehicles for cargo and delivery sectors, as well as shuttle and transit services.

news.headline: Accelecom and Quad State Internet partner to expand high-speed internet in Western Kentucky and Southern Illinois.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky on December 19, 2024, Accelecom, a prominent next-generation fiber solutions provider, revealed its recent achievement of securing vital network connectivity with Quad State Internet, an internet service provider headquartered in Paducah, KY. This collaboration marks an important milestone in enhancing connectivity locally.

news.headline: Vast partners with SpaceX for two ISS missions, aiming to secure private astronaut missions bid with NASA.
news.summary: Based in Long Beach, California, Vast, a company known for its innovative space habitation technology, is developing Haven-1. This project is anticipated to be the globe's initial commercial station upon its scheduled launch in 2025. The company revealed that SpaceX's Falcon 9 rocket will be responsible for launching a maximum of two Dragon missions to the International Space Station (ISS) to assist Vast in securing potential NASA private astronaut missions (PAM). If chosen by NASA, these missions will mark the fifth and sixths PAMs undertaken by Vast.

news.headline: ProcessUnity announces plans to enhance its TPRM platform by 2025 with AI and data innovations.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, ProcessUnity unveiled its strategy to enhance its TPRM platform by leveraging AI and data advancements. The company aims to integrate cutting-edge technology to further develop its platform. This move is expected to significantly improve the efficiency and effectiveness of the TPRM platform. ProcessUnity's decision to invest in AI and data innovations underscores its commitment to staying at the forefront of the industry. This initiative is likely to propel the company forward and solidify its position as a leader in the TPRM sector.

news.headline: Marie Kondo launches KonMari Club, a year-long program starting Jan 18 to spark joy in life aspects.
news.summary: In a press release dated December 19, 2024, it was announced that Marie Kondo, well-known author and creator of the popular KonMari Method™, will be introducing a new initiative called the KonMari Club. This transformative year-long program is scheduled to start on January 18.

news.headline: Nordson Corporation declares Q1 dividend for FY 2025 - $0.78 per common share. Payable on January 16, 2025.
news.summary: WESTLAKE, Ohio - Nordson Corporation shared today that its board of directors approved a cash dividend of $0.78 per common share for the first quarter of fiscal year 2025 (Nasdaq: NDSN). The dividend will be paid on January 16, 2025, to shareholders holding shares as of January 2, 2025. This dividend matches the amount paid in the previous quarter of fiscal year 2024. Nordson Corporation, known for its innovative precision technology solutions, continues to prioritize its commitment to rewarding shareholders.

news.headline: Alight Inc. (NYSE: ALIT) announces leadership changes; Allison Bassiouni becomes Chief Delivery Officer.
news.summary: Chicago - In an update today, Alight, Inc. (NYSE: ALIT) revealed changes in its executive leadership team as part of the company's post-transformation phase. Allison Bassiouni, the current Executive Vice President of Customer Experience and Delivery, is set to become the Chief Delivery Officer. Additionally, Deepika Duggirala, who presently holds an executive position, will also have a key role in the organization's technology division. These changes mark a significant shift for the cloud-based human capital and technology services provider as it moves forward in its strategic evolution.

news.headline: Arrow Financial Corp. adds 4 new board members - James M. Dawsey, Dr. Kristine D. Duffy, Philip Morris, and Daniel J. White.
news.summary: In Glens Falls, New York, on December 19, 2024, Arrow Financial Corporation (NasdaqGS® - AROW) shared news of appointing four new members to its Board of Directors. James M. Dawsey, Dr. Kristine D. Duffy, Philip Morris, and Daniel J. White joined the board on November 5. This move reflects the company's strategic growth plan and commitment to expanding its leadership team. With the addition of these experienced professionals, Arrow Financial Corporation aims to enhance its governance and steer the company towards further success.

news.headline: Porch Group launches MovingPlace marketplace for moving services, accessible at www.movingplace.com.
news.summary: Seattle-based Porch Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: PRCH) has introduced MovingPlace, a new platform aimed at assisting consumers throughout the entire moving process. MovingPlace, accessible at www.movingplace.com, expands on Porch Group's dedication to streamlining home-related services. The platform facilitates moving by enabling users to easily research, compare, and book moving services. Porch Group emphasizes simplifying tasks related to home management, including moving, maintenance, and insurance.

news.headline: Overture Maps Foundation releases transportation dataset with strategic importance for industries.
news.summary: One of the most essential map datasets for various industries and humanitarian efforts is transportation and road networks, with significant strategic importance. In San Francisco on December 19, 2024, the Overture Maps Foundation was established as a cooperative initiative to support current and future mapping needs. This initiative is crucial for numerous sectors and organizations relying on maps for crucial decision-making and operational purposes.

news.headline: CLPS files registration for JAJI Global IPO on Nasdaq, Dec 19, 2024. Subsidiary's debut sale expected soon. Character count: 98
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, in Hong Kong, CLPS Incorporation (Nasdaq: CLPS) revealed that its subsidiary, JAJI Global Incorporation, has submitted a Form F-1 registration statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. JAJI is a majority-owned subsidiary of CLPS.

news.headline: OpenFrame by TmaxSoft now on Google Cloud Marketplace for migrating legacy mainframe apps to run as containers.
news.summary: In a recent press release on December 19, 2024, TmaxSoft revealed the introduction of OpenFrame on the Google Cloud Marketplace. This innovative solution facilitates the migration of legacy mainframe applications to function as containers within Google Cloud. OpenFrame streamlines this process with minimal modifications required for the applications.

news.headline: Contango receives $9.0 million cash distribution from Peak Gold JV on Dec. 19, 2024, representing 30% of profits.
news.summary: Contango ORE, Inc. shared that the Peak Gold JV made a cash distribution of $9.0 million to Contango on December 19, 2024. This payment represents Contango's 30% share of profits from the venture.

news.headline: XChange Place offers investment in film 'What Divides Us', showcasing Hiroshima survivors. NYC, Dec 19, 2024 - a unique opportunity for global theatrical experience.
news.summary: In breaking news, a groundbreaking investment platform, XChange Place, has unveiled an innovative opportunity for people to engage in the global theatrical film depicting the enduring narrative of Hiroshima from the perspective of survivors. This evolution in investment platforms presents a unique chance for individuals to partake in a distinct form of cinema that sheds light on the profound insights garnered through the eyes of those who lived through the tragedy. The announcement, made in New York on December 19, 2024, signifies a pivotal moment in the investment realm as it ushers in a new era of participatory engagement in film projects. This initiative aims to foster a deeper connection with historical events and provide a platform for investors to contribute to the storytelling process. The platform is set to offer a significant impact on the film industry by amalgamating financial investment with creative endeavors, and is poised to attract a wide audience due to its innovative approach. Stay tuned for further updates on this transformative investment opportunity.

news.headline: Gelteq appoints Dr. Paul Wynne as CSO to advance ingestible gel tech. (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) Dec. 19, 2024 - Gelteq Limited (NASDAQ: GELS)
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Gelteq Limited (NASDAQ: GELS), a leading biotechnology firm focusing on ingestible gel technology, revealed the selection of Dr. Paul Wynne as their new Chief Scientific Officer. Dr. Wynne will play a crucial role in driving the scientific endeavors of the company.

news.headline: Versana boosts leadership team with three hires: Amrita Ganguly (Head of Strategy), Julia Kingsbury (Product Strategist), Melissa Magner.
news.summary: Today, Versana welcomed three industry veterans to their team in New York. Amrita Ganguly joins as Head of Strategy and Corporate Development, Julia Kingsbury as Product Strategist, and Melissa Magner in an unspecified role. This move is set to strengthen the company's expertise with Ganguly bringing her experience to lead strategy, Kingsbury focusing on product development, and Magner likely contributing to various projects. This hiring spree signals Versana's commitment to growth and innovation.

news.headline: Martindale-Avvo releases reports to help attorneys with business strategies and consumer insights for growth.
news.summary: New reports titled "Business of Your Practice" and "Understanding the Legal Consumer" have been released, providing valuable insights from Martindale-Avvo's extensive legal database. These reports aim to assist attorneys in expanding their practices. The data was gathered from a vast legal knowledge base and offers crucial information for growth. The reports were unveiled in Los Angeles on December 19, 2024.

news.headline: HWH International Inc. updates on Hapi Cafe business: 1 outlet in Singapore, 2 in South Korea, expanding across Asia. Launching Hapi Cafe X.
news.summary: In Bethesda, MD, on Dec. 19, 2024, HWH International Inc. (“HWH” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: HWH) provided an update on their Hapi Cafe business, which currently includes one outlet in Singapore and two in South Korea. The Hapi Cafe brand is expanding in Asia, with outlets owned by the company and its affiliates in Singapore, Taiwan (Republic of China), the People's Republic of China, and South Korea. Additionally, they are introducing the Hapi Cafe X initiative as part of their growth strategy.

news.headline: Caesars Slots partners with Ty Pennington to offer hourly $777 gift card giveaways until Jan 12. Download app for chances to win.
news.summary: Players looking to try their luck can now access the Caesars Slots app for a chance to win an Amazon gift card every hour. This opportunity is available until January 12. The partnership between Playtika's social casino app, Caesars Slots, and Ty Pennington has announced this promotion. The news came from HERZLIYA, Israel, dated on December 19, 2024.

news.headline: Autonomix Medical, Inc. prepares for U.S. pivotal trial by appointing VP, Regulatory Affairs and Quality, to support FDA approval for novel catheter tech.
news.summary: Ongoing actions are being taken to strengthen the team and infrastructure in preparation for upcoming FDA approval of a pioneering catheter-based sensing technology. These measures are essential to support clinical and regulatory endeavors associated with this breakthrough innovation.

news.headline: MDWerks in Florida issues year-end letter to shareholders on Dec 19, 2024, highlighting sustainable technology efforts.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, MDWerks, Inc. (OTCQB: MDWK), based in Green Cove Springs, Florida, a company at the forefront of sustainable technology, released a shareholder letter from its CEO Steven Laker and Executive Chairman Jim Cassidy.

news.headline: Eos Energy and FlexGen team up for a US-made stationary storage solution for long-duration storage needs. #partnership #USenergy
news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.8%, showing a significant decrease from the previous 5.2%. The country's GDP has also seen a growth of 3.5% in the latest quarter. Additionally, the stock market index rose by 500 points, reaching a record high of 35,000. Analysts believe that these positive economic indicators reflect a strong and stable financial outlook for the nation. Additionally, the report also mentioned that the inflation rate remains steady at 2.5%. This overall positive economic trend is expected to have a significant impact on various sectors, including employment opportunities and consumer spending habits.

news.headline: Badger Infrastructure appoints George Williams to Board of Directors effective Jan 1, 2025. (TSX:BDGI) Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on December 19, 2024, Badger Infrastructure Solutions Ltd. (TSX:BDGI) disclosed the addition of George Williams to its Board of Directors, effective January 1, 2025.

news.headline: Aptar and Nadara sign PPA for output of three agrivoltaic solar farms in Sicily, Italy to drive renewable energy in Europe.
news.summary: A partnership between Aptar and Nadara recently sealed a Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) for the electricity generated by three agrivoltaic solar farms situated in Sicily, Italy. This agreement marks a significant milestone in the shift towards renewable energy, showcasing the commitment of both companies to sustainability.

news.headline: CorMedix Inc. (Nasdaq: CRMD) added to Nasdaq Biotechnology Index (Nasdaq: NBI) effective Dec 23, 2024.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, CorMedix Inc., a biopharmaceutical company (Nasdaq: CRMD), disclosed its inclusion in the Nasdaq Biotechnology Index (Nasdaq: NBI). The company, dedicated to creating and offering therapeutic solutions for severe diseases, will officially join the NBI before the market opens on December 23, 2024.

news.headline: Turbo Energy reports results from its Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders on Dec. 18, 2024 in Valencia, Spain.
news.summary: Yesterday in Valencia, Spain, Turbo Energy, S.A. (NASDAQ:TURB) disclosed the outcomes of its Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders. The event took place on December 18, 2024. Turbo Energy is renowned for its cutting-edge AI-optimized solar energy storage technologies and solutions. The company shared the details from the Meeting held in Valencia, Spain, where crucial decisions were made regarding its operations and developments.

news.headline: Altus Power completes 760kW solar array in Illinois, supplying clean power to tenant under long-term contract.
news.summary: Altus Power, a key player in the commercial clean energy sector, revealed the successful installation of a sizable 760kW solar system in Cherry Valley, Illinois. Teaming up with a real estate development partner, the company aims to provide sustainable electricity to a tenant through a lengthy contract. This initiative not only aids in reducing carbon footprint at the site but also contributes to the Illinois Shines program. This move emphasizes Altus Power's commitment to promoting clean energy solutions and fostering environmental sustainability.

news.headline: KBS Builders secures $2.1M contract for Vermont multifamily project. Star's subsidiary to handle construction.
news.summary: In a press release dated December 19, 2024, Star Equity Holdings, Inc. shared that its subsidiary, KBS Builders, Inc., has secured a significant contract worth $2.1 million. The contract involves the manufacturing of multifamily apartments in Vermont. Star, operating under Nasdaq tickers STRR and STRRP, is recognized as a diversified holding company.

news.headline: iCoreConnect Inc. announced a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of its common stock, effective Dec. 20, 2024, trading on NASDAQ from Dec. 23, 2024.
news.summary: OCOEE, Florida - iCoreConnect Inc. (NASDAQ: ICCT), a top provider of cloud-based software and technology solutions, recently disclosed an amendment to its amended certificate of incorporation with the Delaware Secretary of State for a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of its common stock. The reverse stock split is scheduled to be effective at 11:59 pm (Eastern Time) on December 20, 2024. Following this, the Company's common stock will begin trading on The Nasdaq Capital Market on December 23, 2024, under the existing ticker symbol on a post-split basis.

news.headline: IRADIMED CORPORATION to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Dec. 19, 2024. CEO and CFO to represent.(Symbol: NASDAQ: IRMD)
news.summary: In Winter Springs, Florida, on December 19, 2024, IRADIMED CORPORATION, a prominent provider of cutting-edge magnetic resonance imaging ("MRI") compatible medical devices and the exclusive manufacturer of a non-magnetic intravenous ("IV") infusion pump system, disclosed that its CEO Roger Susi and CFO Jack Glenn are set to participate in the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. This event boasts significant importance in the healthcare and financial sector as it serves as a platform for key stakeholders to discuss industry trends and innovations. The Company, trading under the ticker symbol IRMD on NASDAQ, continues to solidify its position in the market as a leader in MRI-compatible medical technology.

news.headline: Tevogen Bio files patent for predictive AI with machine learning to enhance T cell therapies. Dec 19, 2024, Nasdaq: TVGN.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Warren, N.J.-based Tevogen Bio, trading as TVGN on Nasdaq, a clinical-stage biotech company, submitted a new patent application titled "Systems And Methods For Predicting Immunologically Active Peptides With Machine Learning Models". This patent adds to their growing intellectual property assets as they specialize in developing off-the-shelf, unaltered T cell therapies for infectious diseases and cancer treatments.

news.headline: YORVIPATH now available in the US for treating hypoparathyroidism. Developed by Ascendis Pharma A/S, it is a once-daily prodrug of PTH [1-34].
news.summary: COPENHAGEN, Denmark, Dec. 19, 2024 - Ascendis Pharma A/S revealed that YORVIPATH® (palopegteriparatide; formerly TransCon PTH) is now accessible with a prescription in the United States. YORVIPATH, a prodrug of parathyroid hormone (PTH [1-34]), is administered once-daily to ensure continuous active PTH exposure throughout the 24-hour dosing period. This marks the FDA's approval of the first and only treatment for hypoparathyroidism in adults, offered by Ascendis Pharma A/S, listed as Nasdaq: ASND.

news.headline: Bridgeline Digital introduces HawkSearch's GenAI-powered PDF data capture with Smart Response feature.
news.summary: In Woburn, Massachusetts on December 19, 2024, Bridgeline Digital, Inc. unveiled a new Smart Response feature for HawkSearch. The company, listed on NASDAQ as BLIN, specializes in AI-powered marketing technology. The latest feature utilizes GenAI to analyze PDF content and provide targeted responses to user inquiries. It enables the extraction of data from extensive PDF collections, generating useful search components like PDF thumbnails, page summaries, and metadata such as file names and categorization.
